# Change Loop

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/figmaboundarydocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to Figma AI Agent Daemon Boundary](../figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md)

Top-down:

- When Figma changes saved data, generated API, or assignment semantics, update contracts/control-plane first. Daemon changes only after the upstream fact becomes an assignment, lifecycle command, liveness field, or provider-runtime input.

Bottom-up:

- When daemon runtime evidence finds a lifecycle, provider, batching, or detection limitation, record the daemon fact here first and escalate upstream only if client-facing semantics must change.
